{{Quote|For Jabba's dinner tonight, I am preparing him a succulent plate of charbroiled sand-maggot kidneys, served with a chilled carafe of fermented worrt milk. Is this elegant meal enough for him?|[[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]]|<ref name="SWG:Porcellus">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Porcellus|Tatooine}}</ref>}}
The '''sandmaggot''' was an [[Insect/Legends|insect]] native to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Its [[Kidney/Legends|kidneys]] could be prepared as a dish, as [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]] was fond of doing for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]],<ref name="Taster's Choice: The Tale of Jabba's Chef">{{StoryCite|story=Taster's Choice: The Tale of Jabba's Chef|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}}</ref> and its [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] fermented into a [[Color/Legends|silvery-green]] delicacy.<ref name="Goatgrass: The Tale of Ree-Yees">{{StoryCite|story=Goatgrass: The Tale of Ree-Yees|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}}</ref>
